pr.title: SubSixteen: Sliding Window + FP16 Embed + 10L Flat + Muon WD + Overtone Init (val_bpb 1.1764)

output.summary: Flat 10-layer GPT with U-Net skips, FP16 tied embeddings, and Muon-optimized int8+zlib pipeline plus sliding-window eval for <16MB artifacts.
techniques: 10-layer flat GPT with U-Net skips replacing depth recurrence
Stride-64 sliding-window eval scoring every token
Per-row int8+zlib quant with FP16 tied embeddings and Muon-decoupled weight decay
